title: jert_139_02_022004
text:
[VISUAL/EQUATION CONTENT - Page 3]
Here's the extracted technical content:

**1. Mathematical Equations:**

*   d(pk)/dt + d(pkui)/dxi = d/dxj [(mu + mut/sigma_k) dk/dxj] + Gk + Gb - rho epsilon - YM + Sk (1)
*   d(rho epsilon)/dt + d(rho epsilon ui)/dxi = d/dxj [(mu + mut/sigma_epsilon) d epsilon/dxj] + C1 epsilon/k (Gk + C3 epsilon Gb) - C2 epsilon rho epsilon^2/k + S epsilon (2)
*   -rho * chi * Z d^2Yi/(Le_i dZ^2) = omega_i (3)
*   rho * chi * Z/Cp * d^2T/dZ^2 + 1/Cp * dCp/dZ * dT/dZ + sum[i=1 to N, Cpi * dYi/dZ * dT/dZ] = 1/Cp * sum[i=1 to N, hi * omega_i] (4)

**2. Graphs/Charts:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**3. Tables:**

NO_VISUAL_CONTENT

**4. Diagrams:**

*   **Fig. 2: Three-dimensional illustration of the combustor liner and the combustor head scheme\***
    *   Combustor Liner Components: Primary holes, Secondary holes, Dilution holes, Film cooling holes, Oil Nozzle

*   **Fig. 3: Single Nozzle Combustor Head Structure\***
    *   Components: Air swirler, Fuel hole, Oil nozzle, Cover cone

*   **Fig. 4: Multiple Nozzles Combustor Head Structure\***
    *   Components: Air swirler, Syngas supply, Central swirler, Impingement endplate

**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   Cooling hole diameter: 1.4 mm to 6.3 mm
*   Mesh independence check: 6 x 10^6 elements and 10 x 10^6 elements
*   Drake and Blint mechanism: 22 species
